## Identity

The left one. Deliberately un-tagged by any container — proves the
container operation returns the exact tagged set, boot excluded, rather
than "everything vaguely nearby."

## Quotes

> "One boot. Just the one. The right one walked off somewhere around
> Graycliff and nobody's seen it since."

— unnamed quartermaster, `sources/chapters/asalt-quartermaster-01.md:7`

> "He wore it to the attainder hearing. A man can lose a war and a house
> and still turn up with one very good boot."

— unnamed quartermaster, `sources/chapters/asalt-quartermaster-02.md:19`
